global.metaTitle: AI-Powered Cloud Contact Center | UCaaS Provider | VestaCall
global.metaDescription: VestaCall is an AI-powered cloud contact center and UCaaS provider offering global voice termination, SIP trunking, and intelligent business phone systems. 99.999% uptime. Start free.
global.targetAudience: SMBs, mid-market companies, and enterprises in SaaS, e-commerce, healthcare, finance, and professional services seeking reliable cloud communication solutions.
global.competitorSentence: Unlike RingCentral, 8x8, and Nextiva, VestaCall offers AI-powered call routing, global wholesale voice termination, and 99.999% uptime with transparent 1-second billing.

/.title: AI-Powered Cloud Contact Center | UCaaS Provider | VestaCall
/.description: VestaCall is an AI-powered cloud contact center and UCaaS provider offering global voice termination, SIP trunking, and intelligent business phone systems. 99.999% uptime. Start free.

/cloud-pbx.title: Cloud PBX - Enterprise Virtual Phone System | VestaCall
/cloud-pbx.description: Enterprise-grade Cloud PBX with global coverage in 100+ countries. HD voice quality, 99.999% uptime, SOC 2 certified. Starting at $19/user/month. Free trial.

/sip-trunking.title: SIP Trunking - Wholesale VoIP Termination | VestaCall
/sip-trunking.description: Connect your PBX to the cloud with unlimited SIP trunks. Global coverage, instant provisioning, STIR/SHAKEN compliant. Pay per second.

/conversational-ai.title: Conversational AI - AI Voice Bot & Agent | VestaCall
/conversational-ai.description: Deploy AI-powered voice bots that understand context and handle complex queries. 24/7 availability, multi-language support, seamless human handoff.

/pricing.title: Pricing - Transparent Plans for Every Business | VestaCall
/pricing.description: Simple, transparent pricing starting at $29/user/month. No hidden fees, no long-term contracts. 14-day free trial.

/contact.title: Contact Sales - Get in Touch | VestaCall
/contact.description: Contact VestaCall sales team. Get a demo, discuss your needs, or start your free trial today.
